title: bupleurum glumaceum var. euglumaceum
intro: Bupleurum glumaceum var. euglumaceum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a type of Chinese thorowax or Chinese kuko. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum glumaceum var. euglumaceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, decoctions, and tinctures, and can also be combined with other herbs in formulas to enhance its medicinal effects.
